name: Tidelift
description: Tidelift — Open source security and licensing compliance subscription platform for enterprise OSS dependency management.

seo.title: Tidelift — Developer Portals / API Management
seo.meta_description: Tidelift: Tidelift — Open source security and licensing compliance subscription platform for enterprise OSS dependency management.

when_to_use: OSS dependency security and licensing compliance
SLA-backed OSS maintainer support for enterprise teams
License risk scanning for open-source dependencies
Funded maintainer program to secure critical OSS packages

review.verdict: Ethically-sound OSS compliance option, but pricing and scope make Snyk or Mend the pragmatic default.
review.best_for: Enterprises wanting paid OSS maintainer support contracts
review.not_for: Startups with light compliance or tight security budgets
